headlines: Your Next Hire Isn't on LinkedIn
primary_texts: LinkedIn isn't the only place top talent hides. In this 90-minute live workshop, you'll master AI tools that uncover qualified candidates from untapped sources — and build talent pools that actually convert. Grab your spot →

Recruiters who rely solely on LinkedIn are missing 70% of the market. Learn how to leverage AI-powered sourcing strategies that your competitors haven't discovered yet. Join us April 2nd. Reserve your seat →

Tired of fighting over the same LinkedIn profiles as everyone else? This hands-on workshop shows you exactly how to use AI to find, organise, and engage talent where no one else is looking. Spots are limited — claim yours →
What if you could build a pipeline of top candidates without touching LinkedIn? We'll show you the AI toolkit that forward-thinking TA teams are using right now to source smarter. Save your spot →

The best candidates aren't scrolling LinkedIn — they're hiding in plain sight. Join HR leaders learning to harness AI for talent discovery across overlooked channels. Pro tier includes the full AI Toolkit. Register now →
